message:
fix: guard against null kubectlProxy responses in agent fetchers (#9410)

When the kubectl proxy is disconnected or in cooldown, getPodIssues can
return null at runtime despite the TypeScript signature. Apply defensive
(data || []) guards before calling .map() in agentFetchers.ts,
useCachedCoreWorkloads.ts, and mcp/workloads.ts to prevent TypeError
crashes during local agent fallback.

Fixes #9404

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
